creator: pat@databits.net
text:
Fixed checksum

Added DIST_SUBDIR=5.0r47 to fix compatibility issues with older versions
of the tarball still in distfiles directory since all flashplugin tarballs,
old or new, are all named flash_linux.tar.gz.

The flash_linux.tar.gz in ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/5.0r47/
is version 5.0r47 of the flashplugin but with a different checksum then the one on
macromedia's site. Committers please fix.

Thanks,

Patrick Li < pat@databits.net >

How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
